tips.title: Tonight's story becomes tomorrow's quiz
tips.message: Finished stories become one gentle quiz of up to five questions the next morning.

tips.title: Morning ritual
tips.message: The quiz replaces this tip card and remembers each answer until all questions are finished.

tips.title: Quiz bonus
tips.message: A perfect mixed morning quiz adds sparkle to every represented story sticker.

tips.title: Surprise
tips.message: Roll a hero, place, and magic object when you want a story without planning.

tips.title: Roll again
tips.message: On Surprise, roll again until the cards feel right, then start the story.

tips.title: Custom
tips.message: Type a gentle story idea when the ready-made worlds are not enough.

tips.title: Plan
tips.message: Use Plan for stories about something coming soon, like school, trips, or routine changes.

tips.title: Practice tomorrow
tips.message: Plan stories help rehearse new routines gently before they happen in real life.

tips.title: Story worlds
tips.message: Each world has curated story seeds with its own mood, artwork, and narrator choice.

tips.title: Story seeds
tips.message: Each row in a story world is a seed; finishing all seeds in that world earns a diamond.

tips.title: Listening streak
tips.message: One completed story per day keeps the streak going. Three days unlock rare stickers.

tips.title: Stickers
tips.message: Every finished story earns a sticker in the weekly sticker album.

tips.title: Rare stickers
tips.message: When your listening streak is three days or more, new story stickers become rare.

tips.title: Sticker sparkle
tips.message: Answer every morning question correctly to add sparkle to all represented story stickers.

tips.title: Diamond stickers
tips.message: Collect every seed in a story world during the week to earn that world's diamond.

tips.title: Sticker album
tips.message: Every finished story earns a sticker. Collect all stories in a world for its diamond.

tips.title: Books
tips.message: Tap the heart during playback to save a story, then replay it later from Books.

tips.title: Your week
tips.message: This week shows stories played, listening time, rare rewards, and sticker progress.

tips.title: Listening time
tips.message: Your week counts completed listening time, so replayed favorites still matter.

tips.title: Narrator voices
tips.message: Setup lets you choose a different narrator for each story world.

tips.title: Hide voices
tips.message: Tap the eye-slash beside a narrator voice if it is not a good fit for your family.

tips.title: Voice cloning
tips.message: Record a family voice and download the cloning model to unlock cloned narration.

tips.title: Cloned voices
tips.message: Record a short clear sample, then assign that voice to any story world in Setup.

tips.title: Cloning model
tips.message: Voice cloning needs one larger download; normal narrator voices work without it.

tips.title: Keep favorites
tips.message: Use the heart while listening to keep a story in Books for later replay.
